title: Fruit of Thieves
description: A mod that adds fruit from sea of thieves
body:
A mod that adds 7 fruit items from Sea of Thieves.
each item has its own food statistics. Pineapples can be eaten twice before being entirely used, but other foods cant. one whole coconut can be turned into two half coconuts that you can eat.

Keep in mind, the items are unobtainable without cheats. You can find them at the bottom of the 'Food and Drinks' tab in the creative menu.
